features: Gently Cleanses the Skin: Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yoghurt Body Wash gently cleanses the skin without drying it.
Moisturises and Soothes the Skin: Gently works on normal to dry skin and keeps it feeling moisturised, velvety soft, and healthy-looking.
Delicious Vanilla & Oat Scent: Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yoghurt Body Wash enriches your senses with a delicious smelling vanilla and oat scent.
Dermatologist Tested: Expertly formulated with prebiotic oat and probiotic Greek yoghurt to soothe the skin and help preserve its natural moisture barrier.
Suitable for Sensitive Skin: Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yoghurt Body Wash revitalises normal to dry skin and is suitable for sensitive skin.
description: Product Description Healthier-looking skin starts in the shower and Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Wash is here to help. Formulated with prebiotic oat and probiotic Greek yogurt, this body wash soothes the skin and helps preserve its natural moisture barrier. Not only does it cleanse the skin and keeps it feeling moisturised, velvety soft, and healthy-looking, but it also enriches your senses with a delicious smelling vanilla and oat scent. Use this body wash daily and allow its unique 95% biodegradable formula to cleanse your skin without drying it. Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Wash revitalises normal to dry skin and is suitable for sensitive skin. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Hydrolyzed Potato Starch Dodeceny/succinate, Avena Sativa Kernel (Oat) Flour, Yogurt Powder, Guar Hydroxypropyitrimonium Chloride, Polyquaternium-10, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Chloride, Glycol Distearate, Disodium Tetrapropenyl Succinate, Laureth-4, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Citric Acid, Lactic acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate [PR-018015] Manufacturer Contact Information UK: Johnson & Johnson Ltd, High Wycombe, HP12 4EG. IE: Johnson & Johnson (Ireland) Ltd, Tallaght, Dublin 24. See more
